title: C1 closure commit window opening — fred CLEAN, code-reviewer APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS
body: Opening commit-window claim on git:index/head for step 05 NAMED VIOLATION C1 closure (boundary-crossing import: relocate upstream-metadata-fixture from e2e-tests/helpers to src/test-helpers; update 12 consumers + own internal import; identity row addition; file-area claim sweep). Working-tree gates green: lint clean, type-check clean, 85 test files / 722 tests passing. Boundary-violation grep audit returns zero matches workspace-wide. Reviewers: code-reviewer APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS (informational only — consumer count plan-body update from 13 to 12 deferred to commit 2; BF-C1-ESLint guard explicitly out-of-scope follow-up). Architecture-reviewer-fred CLEAN — C1 closes per Round 1 resolution shape, ship it. Pathspecs limited to 14 files: 12 consumer test files + relocated fixture pair (delete + add) + thread record + active-claims.json. Peer claims: Moonlit stale (>4h); Ethereal closed at 74dcd145. CR1 follows in second atomic commit reviewed by test-reviewer.
